title: Fredrikstad, Viken — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Fredrikstad is a city in Viken with a population of 82,000. A charming coastal city with a well-preserved 17th-century fortified old town and a vibrant arts scene.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
